---
name: Rubric or spec proposal
about: Propose a new domain rubric, a change to the six dimensions, or a spec amendment
title: "[rubric/spec] "
labels: spec
assignees: ""
---

**What are you proposing?**
<!-- e.g. a new `legal` domain rubric; a change to how Verification is probed for data work -->

**Why does the current framework miss this?**

**Draft rubric focus / dimension probes**
<!-- For a rubric: what should an expert reviewer of this domain focus on? 3-6 bullets.
     For a dimension change: the before/after wording and why. -->

**A worked example** (strongly encouraged)
<!-- A piece of AI-assisted work in this domain + the questions a good review would ask.
     Proposals with worked examples get adopted much faster. -->
